A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''moisture farmer''' lived in a farm on the edge of the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]], where his family had lived for generations on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]] hired a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|hunter]] to kill dangerous creatures that haunted the surrounding area of his farm, because he feared that they might move close to the farm and attack him and his children.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The moisture farmer was mentioned in the description of a mission called "Help Me...", that was available to players of ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' at mission terminals on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
